prestazioni: FA24F 2.4L turbocharged boxer engine: Cobb Tuning Accessport V3 Stage 2+ with custom dyno-tuned map targeting 380whp/420wtq on E85 blend, utilizing a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbo (84mm compressor, 62mm turbine) with billet compressor wheel and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate and custom 3.5" stainless downpipe with 100-cell catalytic converter delete

FA24F fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines, and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Fore Innovations F2i fuel pressure regulator to support 30psi base fuel pressure under boost

FA24F drivetrain and cooling: STI 6-speed manual transmission reinforcement via Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential with 1.5/2.0 preload settings, Koyoritsu Racing carbon fiber driveshaft, and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler with dual 12" SPAL fans, alongside a Mishimoto X-Line aluminum radiator and a GReddy intercooler with 1000cfm airflow capacity
estetica: STI Sport Plus-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper canards, and rear diffuser, featuring a 30mm extended wheelbase for 285/30R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +38 front, 19x10.5 +42 rear)

Full carbon fiber STI Sport Plus exterior overhaul: Seibon carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts, Varis Japan carbon fiber roof panel, and a custom STI-style rear wing with Gurney flap, all finished in Subaru World Rally Blue Pearl with matte black accents and STI Gold pinstriping

Interior bespoke modifications: Bride Zeta IV STI-spec bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a custom STI Sport Plus roll cage by AutoPower Industries with integrated fire suppression system, and a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with a Motec C127 digital dash display replacing the stock cluster, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub
